x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Entitlement Determination Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifies eligible investors based on record date and holdings of the security.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Calculation Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Calculates the dividend amount payable based on the number of shares held and declared dividend rate.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collection from Issuer Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Receives dividend payments from the issuing company or market infrastructure.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Distribution Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Credits dividends to customer accounts in cash or additional shares (stock dividend).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Handling Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Applies withholding tax or tax adjustments according to applicable regulations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Corporate Actions Management Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Manages dividend-related events as part of corporate actions processing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reporting & Notification Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides statements and notifications to customers regarding dividend payments and details.
